poi_detail.site_instruction: Main HQ. Check in at front gate. Security badge required.
Load 1 pickup. Dock 4B. Call yard manager on arrival.
Load 1 delivery. Rear receiving dock. Call ahead.
Load 4 pickup. Tanker top-load fill station on north side.
Load 4 delivery. Offload via bottom valve. Hard hat and safety vest required.
